protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: Pipette MIL or IL onto plant tissue, incubate, collect hydrophobic liquid, add to qPCR buffer; no wash or centrifugation in static/dispersive methods.

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: Dispersive: suspend tissue in Tris buffer, add MIL, vortex, recover MIL with magnet, pipette into qPCR buffer.

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: One-pot: add plant tissue, MIL or IL, and qPCR buffer to reaction tube; reaction run at 60 C with 0.05% Tween20 and 2.5% DMSO.

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: MIL-based one-step plant cell lysis and DNA extraction; lysate desorbed into qPCR buffer or Tris buffer at 90 C; compatible with qPCR and sequencing/Qubit

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: static one-step cell lysis and DNA extraction... MIL or IL coated leaf was incubated at 25C... 0.3 uL of MIL was added to the qPCR assay

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: dispersive one-step lysis and DNA extraction... DNA-enriched MIL was washed once with water... integrating 0.3 uL of DNA-enriched MIL into the qPCR assay

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: Conventional plant cell lysis... CTAB lysis buffer... After heating the tissue at 60C... sample was centrifuged to ensure phase separation

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: SDS lysis was performed... ground plant tissue, PVPP, RNase... exposed to Tris-EDTA... at 100C... centrifuged... supernatant collected for isopropanol purification
